project_type: React + TypeScript SPA with Vite bundler - Professional automotive DMS dashboard
build_system: Vite 5.x with npm - use `unset NODE_OPTIONS` before any node/npm/npx commands to avoid proxy-bootstrap error
build_command: unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/ind-vias-dms-cockpit && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run build` to verify production build succeeds. 2. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm test -- --run` to verify all tests pass. 3. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run lint` to verify no lint errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/ind-vias-dms-cockpit. 2. unset NODE_OPTIONS. 3. npm install. 4. npm run dev (for development). 5. npm run build (for production).
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - npm install CANNOT run (proxy returns 403 for registry.npmjs.org). Must run `unset NODE_OPTIONS` before any node/npm/npx commands. Node v22.22.3, npm 11.4.2, TypeScript 6.0.3 globally available. Verification strategy: use standalone tsc type-checking on .ts files (not .tsx since React types are not installed). Validate project structure is correct and will build once cloned with network access.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - establishing conventions from scratch.
key_patterns: Tech stack: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Recharts. Architecture: WebSocket telemetry service abstraction with dummy data generator. Component-based dashboard with real-time updates. Dark automotive theme with professional gauges and visualizations.
directory_structure: src/ - main source code. src/components/ - React dashboard components. src/services/ - telemetry service layer (WebSocket + dummy). src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces for DMS data. src/hooks/ - custom React hooks. public/ - static assets.
